issue.lowPriorityDeadline: Low priority with an approaching deadline

issuePanel.healthy: No action needed — this issue looks healthy.

admin.title: Project Assistant settings
admin.subtitle: These settings apply to everyone on this site and can only be changed by Jira admins.

deadline.help: Low-priority issues due within this many days (or overdue) are flagged as at risk — in the table, the stats, and the issue panel.

grace.label: Unassigned grace period
grace.help: How long an issue may stay unassigned before an alert email is sent. It's still flagged as unassigned in the table right away.

confirm.title: Auto-assign unassigned issues
confirm.body: This will assign {{count}} unassigned issue(s) to random active team members. Continue?

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: That item no longer exists. Try refreshing.
errors.conflict: Someone else changed this issue. Refresh and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and retry.
errors.unauthorized: Your session isn't authorized for this action.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
